  1046	.ds-tech > summary .chev {
  1047	  width: 13px;
  1048	  height: 13px;
  1049	  flex: none;
  1050	  color: var(--signal-text);
  1051	  transition: transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
  1052	}
  1053	.ds-tech[open] > summary .chev {
  1054	  transform: rotate(90deg);
  1055	}
  1056	.ds-tech .tech-body {
  1057	  padding: 2px 2px 22px 24px;
  1058	}
  1059	.ds-tech .tech-body p {
  1060	  font-size: 15px;
  1061	  line-height: 1.62;
  1062	  color: var(--body);
  1063	  max-width: 72ch;
  1064	  margin: 0;
  1065	}
  1066	.ds-tech .tech-body p + p {
  1067	  margin-top: 12px;
  1068	}
  1069	.ds-tech .tech-body em {
  1070	  font-style: normal;
  1071	  color: var(--ink);
  1072	  font-weight: 600;
  1073	}
  1074	.ds-tech .tech-body .mono-line {
  1075	  font-family: var(--ff-mono);
  1076	  font-size: 12px;
  1077	  color: var(--muted);
  1078	  line-height: 1.7;
  1079	  margin-top: 12px;
  1080	  letter-spacing: -0.002em;
  1081	}
  1082	.ds-tech .tech-body .mono-line .k {
  1083	  color: var(--graphite);
  1084	}
  1085	
  1086	@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  1087	  .ds-tech > summary .chev {
  1088	    transition: none;
  1089	  }
  1090	}
  1091	
  1092	/* ============================================================================
  1093	   THE "LEDGER" DESIGN SYSTEM (owner-picked 2026-07-08) — a Swiss / International-
  1094	   Typographic audit certificate on a gallery-white ground. Scoped to the two real
  1095	   verifier surfaces (/report + /demo, both mount .rpt-wrap); the landing keeps its
  1096	   own system untouched. Reference (adapted, never copied):
  1097	   mockups/design-samples-2026-07-08/sample-1-ledger.html.
  1098	
  1099	   Ultramarine is the ONE accent — SIMULATED tag block · masthead rule · finding
  1100	   index numerals — NEVER on severity. Severity carries its own three marks
  1101	   (error / warn / info), kept apart from the accent. No radii, no shadows, no
  1102	   gradients: the precision of the hairline rules and the spacing IS the design.
  1103	   Desktop web + printable (see the @media print block below). rpt-* / dmo-*.
  1104	   ========================================================================== */
  1105	.rpt-wrap {
  1106	  /* Ledger tokens — pre-decided; #ffffff is the owner gallery-white modification
  1107	     (the sample used #f9f9f6). Kept as ONE --paper token so text-on-ink surfaces
  1108	     (the banner text, the FAIL flag) follow to #ffffff automatically. */
  1109	  --paper: #ffffff; /* ground + every text-on-ink surface (banner text, verdict flag) */
  1110	  --ink: #101014; /* near-black ink: headline, banner ground, verdict stamp, hard marks */
  1111	  --body: #33333b; /* long-form body text */
  1112	  --graphite: #50505a; /* rail captions, labels, secondary mono */
  1113	  --hairline: #dcdcd4; /* the modular-grid rules (1px, warm-on-white by intent) */
  1114	  --um: #1b3eb8; /* ultramarine — the ONE accent */
  1115	  --sev-err: #a8231b;
  1116	  --sev-warn: #8a5a06;
  1117	  --sev-info: #55555e;
  1118	  /* system font stacks only — no new dependency. Grotesk display + a tabular mono. */
  1119	  --ledger-sans: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, "Liberation Sans", sans-serif;
  1120	  --ledger-mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono",
  1121	    monospace;
  1122	
  1123	  max-width: 1180px;
  1124	  margin: 0 auto;
  1125	  padding: 48px 64px 120px;
  1126	  background: var(--paper);
  1127	  color: var(--body);
  1128	  font-family: var(--ledger-sans);
  1129	  font-size: 15px;
  1130	  line-height: 1.55;
  1131	  letter-spacing: 0;
  1132	}
  1133	
  1134	/* ---- SIMULATED banner — solid ink band, unmissable, first thing on the page.
  1135	   Text uses --paper (#ffffff) on the ink ground; survives print exact. ---- */
  1136	.rpt-sim {
  1137	  display: flex;
  1138	  align-items: flex-start;
  1139	  gap: 22px;
  1140	  padding: 20px 24px;
  1141	  border: none;
  1142	  border-radius: 0;
  1143	  background: var(--ink);
  1144	  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
  1145	  print-color-adjust: exact;
  1146	}
  1147	.rpt-sim-tag {
  1148	  flex: none;
  1149	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1150	  font-size: 12px;
  1151	  font-weight: 700;
  1152	  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  1153	  color: var(--paper);
  1154	  background: var(--um);
  1155	  padding: 7px 12px;
  1156	  border-radius: 0;
  1157	  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
  1158	  print-color-adjust: exact;
  1159	}
  1160	.rpt-sim-text {
  1161	  min-width: 0;
  1162	  margin: 2px 0 0;
  1163	  font-size: 13.5px;
  1164	  line-height: 1.6;
  1165	  color: var(--paper);
  1166	  max-width: 92ch;
  1167	}
  1168	
  1169	/* ---- masthead — flush-left, closed by the single 4px ultramarine rule ---- */
  1170	.rpt-head {
  1171	  margin-top: 0;
  1172	  padding: 44px 0 30px;
  1173	  border-bottom: 4px solid var(--um);
  1174	}
  1175	.rpt-eyebrow {
  1176	  margin: 0;
  1177	  font-family: var(--ledger-sans);
  1178	  font-size: 11px;
  1179	  font-weight: 700;
  1180	  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  1181	  text-transform: uppercase;
  1182	  color: var(--graphite);
  1183	}
  1184	.rpt-title {
  1185	  margin: 16px 0 0;
  1186	  font-family: var(--ledger-sans);
  1187	  font-size: clamp(34px, 4.4vw, 52px);
  1188	  font-weight: 800;
  1189	  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
  1190	  line-height: 1.02;
  1191	  color: var(--ink);
  1192	  max-width: 24ch;
  1193	  text-wrap: balance;
  1194	}
  1195	.rpt-intro {
  1196	  margin: 22px 0 0;
  1197	  font-size: 15.5px;
  1198	  line-height: 1.6;
  1199	  color: var(--body);
  1200	  max-width: 68ch;
  1201	}
  1202	
  1203	/* ---- surface toggle — a flush mono tab strip on a hairline; ink underline for
  1204	   the active surface (ultramarine is reserved for its three sanctioned roles) -- */
  1205	.rpt-toolbar {
  1206	  display: flex;
  1207	  gap: 0;
  1208	  margin-top: 28px;
  1209	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1210	}
  1211	.rpt-tab {
  1212	  font: inherit;
  1213	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1214	  font-size: 12px;
  1215	  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  1216	  cursor: pointer;
  1217	  padding: 10px 16px 11px;
  1218	  border: none;
  1219	  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  1220	  border-radius: 0;
  1221	  background: none;
  1222	  color: var(--graphite);
  1223	  margin-bottom: -1px;
  1224	  transition:
  1225	    color 0.15s ease,
  1226	    border-color 0.15s ease;
  1227	}
  1228	.rpt-tab:first-child {
  1229	  padding-left: 0;
  1230	}
  1231	.rpt-tab:hover {
  1232	  color: var(--ink);
  1233	}
  1234	.rpt-tab.active {
  1235	  color: var(--ink);
  1236	  border-bottom-color: var(--ink);
  1237	}
  1238	
  1239	/* ---- the modular-grid armature: 184px caption rail | continuous hairline | body */
  1240	.rpt-sec {
  1241	  display: grid;
  1242	  grid-template-columns: 184px minmax(0, 1fr);
  1243	  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1244	}
  1245	.rpt-toolbar + .rpt-sec {
  1246	  border-top: none;
  1247	}
  1248	.rpt-rail {
  1249	  margin: 0;
  1250	  padding: 30px 20px 30px 0;
  1251	  font-family: var(--ledger-sans);
  1252	  font-size: 11px;
  1253	  font-weight: 700;
  1254	  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  1255	  text-transform: uppercase;
  1256	  color: var(--graphite);
  1257	}
  1258	.rpt-bodycol {
  1259	  min-width: 0;
  1260	  border-left: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1261	  padding: 30px 0 34px 40px;
  1262	}
  1263	
  1264	/* ---- verdict — the flag is a solid ink stamp (paper-white text on ink, per the
  1265	   --paper token note); the count is mono; the frozen tally sits on its own ruled
  1266	   row as a single mono line (it is one text node — never split into squares) ---- */
  1267	.rpt-verdict {
  1268	  display: flex;
  1269	  align-items: center;
  1270	  flex-wrap: wrap;
  1271	  column-gap: 22px;
  1272	  row-gap: 0;
  1273	  margin: 0;
  1274	  padding: 0;
  1275	  border: none;
  1276	  border-radius: 0;
  1277	  background: none;
  1278	}
  1279	.rpt-verdict-flag {
  1280	  font-family: var(--ledger-sans);
  1281	  font-size: 30px;
  1282	  font-weight: 800;
  1283	  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  1284	  line-height: 1;
  1285	  color: var(--paper);
  1286	  background: var(--ink);
  1287	  padding: 11px 18px;
  1288	  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
  1289	  print-color-adjust: exact;
  1290	}
  1291	.rpt-verdict-count {
  1292	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1293	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  1294	  font-size: 16px;
  1295	  font-weight: 700;
  1296	  color: var(--ink);
  1297	}
  1298	.rpt-verdict-tally {
  1299	  width: 100%;
  1300	  margin: 20px 0 0;
  1301	  padding-top: 14px;
  1302	  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1303	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1304	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  1305	  font-size: 12.5px;
  1306	  color: var(--graphite);
  1307	}
  1308	
  1309	/* ---- meta ledger ---- */
  1310	.rpt-meta {
  1311	  margin: 0;
  1312	  border: none;
  1313	  border-radius: 0;
  1314	  overflow: visible;
  1315	}
  1316	.rpt-mrow {
  1317	  display: grid;
  1318	  grid-template-columns: 170px minmax(0, 1fr);
  1319	  gap: 24px;
  1320	  padding: 12px 0;
  1321	  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1322	}
  1323	.rpt-mrow:first-child {
  1324	  border-top: none;
  1325	  padding-top: 0;
  1326	}
  1327	.rpt-mrow:last-child {
  1328	  padding-bottom: 0;
  1329	}
  1330	.rpt-mrow dt {
  1331	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1332	  font-size: 11px;
  1333	  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  1334	  text-transform: uppercase;
  1335	  color: var(--graphite);
  1336	}
  1337	.rpt-mrow dd {
  1338	  margin: 0;
  1339	  min-width: 0;
  1340	  font-size: 13.5px;
  1341	  color: var(--ink);
  1342	}
  1343	
  1344	/* ---- findings — numbered rows: the plain line leads, four ruled mono receipt
  1345	   columns follow; index numerals wear the ultramarine accent ---- */
  1346	.rpt-findings {
  1347	  list-style: none;
  1348	  margin: 0;
  1349	  padding: 0;
  1350	  border-top: none;
  1351	}
  1352	.rpt-finding {
  1353	  padding: 22px 0 24px;
  1354	  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1355	  border-bottom: none;
  1356	}
  1357	.rpt-finding:first-child {
  1358	  padding-top: 0;
  1359	  border-top: none;
  1360	}
  1361	.rpt-finding-lead {
  1362	  display: grid;
  1363	  grid-template-columns: 56px minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  1364	  column-gap: 18px;
  1365	  align-items: baseline;
  1366	}
  1367	.rpt-idx {
  1368	  font-family: var(--ledger-sans);
  1369	  font-size: 21px;
  1370	  font-weight: 800;
  1371	  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  1372	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  1373	  color: var(--um);
  1374	  flex: none;
  1375	}
  1376	.rpt-plain {
  1377	  margin: 0;
  1378	  flex: initial;
  1379	  font-size: 16px;
  1380	  line-height: 1.45;
  1381	  font-weight: 600;
  1382	  letter-spacing: -0.012em;
  1383	  color: var(--ink);
  1384	  max-width: 74ch;
  1385	}
  1386	/* severity — typographic weight + a 9px square mark (no pill, no radius). The
  1387	   square is a ::before so no markup changes and the frozen text nodes stay put. */
  1388	.rpt-sev {
  1389	  display: inline-flex;
  1390	  align-items: center;
  1391	  gap: 8px;
  1392	  flex: none;
  1393	  padding: 0;
  1394	  border: none;
  1395	  border-radius: 0;
  1396	  background: none;
  1397	  text-transform: none;
  1398	  white-space: nowrap;
  1399	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1400	  font-size: 11px;
  1401	  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  1402	}
  1403	.rpt-sev::before {
  1404	  content: "";
  1405	  width: 9px;
  1406	  height: 9px;
  1407	  flex: none;
  1408	  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
  1409	  print-color-adjust: exact;
  1410	}
  1411	.rpt-sev.error {
  1412	  color: var(--sev-err);
  1413	  font-weight: 700;
  1414	}
  1415	.rpt-sev.error::before {
  1416	  background: var(--sev-err);
  1417	}
  1418	.rpt-sev.warn {
  1419	  color: var(--sev-warn);
  1420	  font-weight: 500;
  1421	}
  1422	.rpt-sev.warn::before {
  1423	  background: var(--sev-warn);
  1424	}
  1425	.rpt-sev.info {
  1426	  color: var(--sev-info);
  1427	  font-weight: 400;
  1428	}
  1429	.rpt-sev.info::before {
  1430	  background: var(--sev-info);
  1431	}
  1432	
  1433	/* the four receipts — held in hairline-separated mono columns, aligned under the
  1434	   plain line (past the 56px numeral column + 18px gap) */
  1435	.rpt-receipts {
  1436	  display: grid;
  1437	  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2.1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(0, 0.9fr);
  1438	  gap: 0;
  1439	  margin: 16px 0 0 74px;
  1440	  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1441	}
  1442	.rpt-rc {
  1443	  display: block;
  1444	  min-width: 0;
  1445	  padding: 11px 18px 0 0;
  1446	}
  1447	.rpt-rc + .rpt-rc {
  1448	  border-left: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1449	  padding-left: 18px;
  1450	}
  1451	.rpt-rc dt {
  1452	  margin: 0 0 5px;
  1453	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1454	  font-size: 10px;
  1455	  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  1456	  text-transform: uppercase;
  1457	  color: var(--graphite);
  1458	}
  1459	.rpt-rc dd {
  1460	  margin: 0;
  1461	  min-width: 0;
  1462	}
  1463	.rpt-mono {
  1464	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1465	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  1466	  font-size: 12px;
  1467	  color: var(--ink);
  1468	  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  1469	}
  1470	/* meta prose sub — grotesk secondary (the plain-language explanation) */
  1471	.rpt-rc-sub {
  1472	  display: block;
  1473	  margin-top: 3px;
  1474	  font-family: var(--ledger-sans);
  1475	  font-size: 12.5px;
  1476	  line-height: 1.55;
  1477	  color: var(--graphite);
  1478	}
  1479	/* findings claim-value sub — mono tabular (the technical receipt value) */
  1480	.rpt-mono-sub {
  1481	  display: block;
  1482	  margin-top: 3px;
  1483	  font-family: var(--ledger-mono);
  1484	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  1485	  font-size: 11.5px;
  1486	  line-height: 1.55;
  1487	  color: var(--graphite);
  1488	  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  1489	}
  1490	
  1491	/* ---- footer — honesty paragraph on the same armature (report: empty rail;
  1492	   demo: a plain ruled block, no rail grid) ---- */
  1493	.rpt-foot {
  1494	  margin: 0;
  1495	  padding: 0;
  1496	  border-top: none;
  1497	}
  1498	.rpt-sec.rpt-foot .rpt-bodycol {
  1499	  padding-bottom: 0;
  1500	}
  1501	.dmo-wrap .rpt-foot {
  1502	  margin-top: 22px;
  1503	  padding-top: 16px;
  1504	  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1505	}
  1506	.rpt-foot p {
  1507	  margin: 0;
  1508	  font-size: 12.5px;
  1509	  line-height: 1.65;
  1510	  color: var(--graphite);
  1511	  max-width: 78ch;
  1512	}
  1513	
  1514	/* ---- collapse below the desktop measure — the grid discipline folds to one
  1515	   column (the surface targets desktop web; this only guards narrow viewports) -- */
  1516	@media (max-width: 900px) {
  1517	  .rpt-wrap {
  1518	    padding: 28px 24px 96px;
  1519	  }
  1520	  .rpt-sec {
  1521	    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  1522	  }
  1523	  .rpt-rail {
  1524	    padding: 22px 0 0;
  1525	  }
  1526	  .rpt-bodycol {
  1527	    border-left: none;
  1528	    padding: 14px 0 28px;
  1529	  }
  1530	  .rpt-finding-lead {
  1531	    grid-template-columns: 44px minmax(0, 1fr);
  1532	  }
  1533	  .rpt-sev {
  1534	    grid-column: 2;
  1535	    justify-self: start;
  1536	    margin-top: 8px;
  1537	  }
  1538	  .rpt-receipts {
  1539	    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
  1540	    margin-left: 0;
  1541	  }
  1542	  .rpt-rc {
  1543	    padding-top: 12px;
  1544	  }
  1545	  .rpt-rc:nth-child(odd) {
  1546	    border-left: none;
  1547	    padding-left: 0;
  1548	  }
  1549	  .rpt-sim {
  1550	    flex-direction: column;
  1551	    gap: 12px;
  1552	  }
  1553	}
  1554	@media (max-width: 560px) {
  1555	  .rpt-wrap {
  1556	    padding: 20px;
  1557	  }
  1558	  .rpt-receipts {
  1559	    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  1560	  }
  1561	  .rpt-rc + .rpt-rc {
  1562	    border-left: none;
  1563	    padding-left: 0;
  1564	  }
  1565	  .rpt-mrow {
  1566	    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  1567	    gap: 4px;
  1568	  }
  1569	}
  1570	
  1571	/* ----- print: one clean report per page, the ink banner preserved on its ground.
  1572	   The SIMULATED banner keeps print-color-adjust: exact (on .rpt-sim above) so it
  1573	   prints on the ink ground, and stays the first thing on the printed page. ----- */
  1574	@media print {
  1575	  nav,
  1576	  footer,
  1577	  .ds-skip,
  1578	  .rpt-toolbar {
  1579	    display: none !important;
  1580	  }
  1581	  html {
  1582	    scroll-behavior: auto;
  1583	  }
  1584	  body {
  1585	    font-size: 12px;
  1586	  }
  1587	  .rpt-wrap {
  1588	    max-width: none;
  1589	    margin: 0;
  1590	    padding: 0;
  1591	  }
  1592	  @page {
  1593	    margin: 14mm;
  1594	  }
  1595	  /* never split a finding (with its receipts) across a page break */
  1596	  .rpt-finding,
  1597	  .rpt-sim,
  1598	  .rpt-verdict,
  1599	  .rpt-meta {
  1600	    break-inside: avoid;
  1601	  }
  1602	  .rpt-head {
  1603	    break-after: avoid;
  1604	  }
  1605	  /* D1 demo: keep each beat whole across page breaks */
  1606	  .dmo-beat {
  1607	    break-inside: avoid;
  1608	  }
  1609	}
  1610	
  1611	/* ============================================================================
  1612	   D1 — the one-page verifier demo (/demo). Reuses the report's Ledger system
  1613	   (rpt-* classes: banner, masthead, findings, receipts) and adds a beat list.
  1614	   Desktop-first, printable. dmo-* namespace.
  1615	   ========================================================================== */
  1616	.dmo-meta {
  1617	  margin-top: 18px;
  1618	}
  1619	.dmo-beats {
  1620	  margin-top: 28px;
  1621	  border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);
  1622	}
  1623	.dmo-beat {
  1624	  padding: 24px 0;

codex
The S3 token comments and live CSS agree on the critical values; the runtime paths for the banner use `var(--paper)` and `var(--ink)`, so the new off-white ground carries through both screen and print. I’m now doing the mechanical checks: contrast math, local variable consumption, and whether any tests or selectors still bind old Ledger literals.

-   ActivationOps — "Ledger Enterprise" design system (Stage 1 foundation)
-   Ported from mockups/v3-ledger-enterprise.html. Premium white ground, a single
-   vermilion accent (two lightnesses of one hue), cool-neutral ink/graphite, and
-   one signature primitive: the hairline-ruled ledger row (field · value · verdict).
-   Fonts are self-hosted via next/font/google (see app/layout.tsx) and reach this
-   file as CSS variables (--font-sans / --font-mono / --font-geist-mono).
+   Curbside Commons — "Oxblood" site design system (S1 foundation, 2026-07-08)
+   Spec: mockups/ultra-modern-2026-07-08/whole-site-gallery-v2.html (owner-picked).
+
+   RETHEME-IN-PLACE: every :root token NAME below is preserved (layout.tsx, Nav,
+   and the landing consume them) but the VALUES are remapped to Oxblood — a premium
+   off-white ground (#FBFBFD), a warm near-black ink ramp (harmonizing with the
+   accent, not cool-gray), wine-tinted hairlines, and ONE burgundy accent (#8A2233,
+   two lightnesses of one hue). An ADDITIVE "OXBLOOD SITE LAYER (S1)" section holds
+   the site-scoped tokens (wine ramp / severity / serif / ease) and the shared shell
+   primitives (nav + footer). Fonts still self-host via next/font/google (see
+   app/layout.tsx) as --font-sans / --font-mono / --font-geist-mono.
+
+   INTENTIONALLY UNTOUCHED (byte-for-byte, superseded by later slices):
+   • the entire `.rpt-wrap` report/demo Ledger block (line ~1105 → its print block)
+     — it redefines --paper/--ink/--body/--graphite/--hairline/--um/--sev-* locally,
+     so it is insulated from these :root remaps (S3 re-skins it to Oxblood);
+   • all `.ds-*` / `.cp-*` / `.lp-*` landing rule blocks — they inherit the new token
+     VALUES (new colors, old layout = the expected hybrid until S2 supersedes them).
@@ -15,23 +27,26 @@
-  /* ground — true premium white, no warmth */
-  --bg: #ffffff;
-  --bg-2: #fcfcfd;
-  --bg-3: #f7f7f9;
-
-  /* ink + graphite structure (cool neutrals, AA+ on white) */
-  --ink: #0a0a0c;
-  --ink-2: #16161a;
-  --body: #34343c; /* 11.6:1 — body text */
-  --graphite: #52525c; /* 7.72:1 — labels, values */
-  --muted: #5d5d68; /* 6.50:1 — secondary mono */
-  --faint: #6c6c78; /* 5.16:1 — non-essential ≥13px */
-
-  /* hairlines */
-  --rule: #ececef;
-  --rule-2: #e0e0e4;
-  --rule-3: #d2d2d8;
-
-  /* THE single accent — vermilion, two lightnesses of one hue */
-  --signal: #e2402a; /* fills, dots, rules, marks */
-  --signal-text: #c0301b; /* 5.71:1 on white — small labels / verdicts */
-  --signal-tint: #fbedea; /* faint held-row ground */
-  --signal-rule: #f0d6cf; /* hairline at signal hue */
+  /* ground — premium off-white (NOT pure #fff; pure white+black is an AI-median
+     tell). Warm-neutral steps down. */
+  --bg: #fbfbfd;
+  --bg-2: #f8f7f8;
+  --bg-3: #f5f3f4;
+
+  /* ink + graphite structure — a WARM near-black ramp (R>G>B), harmonizing with
+     the wine accent. Contrast recomputed on the #fbfbfd ground; every step clears
+     the prior cool-gray token's documented ratio. */
+  --ink: #1a1712; /* 17.29:1 — headings, hard marks */
+  --ink-2: #2e2825; /* 14.05:1 — strong text */
+  --body: #423b38; /* 10.61:1 — body text (spec #463f3c was 9.98:1, darkened to clear ≥10:1) */
+  --graphite: #564d48; /* 7.97:1 — labels, values (≥ old 7.72) */
+  --muted: #615750; /* 6.80:1 — secondary mono (≥ old 6.50) */
+  --faint: #6d635b; /* 5.67:1 — non-essential ≥13px (≥ old 5.16) */
+
+  /* hairlines — wine-tinted (rgba of the wine-900 hue), darkening steps */
+  --rule: rgba(74, 14, 26, 0.1);
+  --rule-2: rgba(74, 14, 26, 0.17);
+  --rule-3: rgba(74, 14, 26, 0.26);
+
+  /* THE single accent — burgundy / oxblood, two lightnesses of one hue */
+  --signal: #8a2233; /* fills, dots, rules, marks */
+  --signal-text: #8a2233; /* 8.62:1 on #fbfbfd — small labels / verdicts (≥4.5) */
+  --signal-tint: rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.07); /* faint held-row ground */
+  --signal-rule: rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.24); /* hairline at signal hue */
@@ -55,0 +71,27 @@
+  /* ==== OXBLOOD SITE LAYER (S1, 2026-07-08) — additive site-scoped tokens ==== */
+  /* wine ramp — the ONE brand hue, wine-900 (darkest) → wine-500 */
+  --wine-900: #3e0a13;
+  --wine-800: #55101d;
+  --wine-700: #6e1423;
+  --wine-600: #8a2233;
+  --wine-500: #9e3143;
+  /* accent aliases (the site layer reads these; = the wine ramp) */
+  --accent: #8a2233;
+  --accent-hi: #6e1423; /* hover / pressed */
+  --accent-soft: rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.07);
+  --accent-line: rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.24);
+  /* severity — kept perceptually FAR from the wine brand (always paired with a
+     shape + word by consuming surfaces, never colour alone) */
+  --error: #d92d20;
+  --error-soft: rgba(217, 45, 32, 0.08);
+  --warn: #b54708;
+  --warn-soft: rgba(181, 71, 8, 0.11);
+  --ok: #067647;
+  --ok-soft: rgba(6, 118, 71, 0.09);
+  /* serif display stack (brand wordmark + headlines) — no new dependency */
+  --serif: ui-serif, "New York", "Iowan Old Style", "Palatino Linotype", Palatino, Georgia,
+    "Times New Roman", serif;
+  /* shared easing */
+  --ease: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
+  /* ==== end OXBLOOD SITE LAYER tokens ==== */
+
@@ -80,0 +123,115 @@ body {
+/* ============================================================================
+   OXBLOOD SITE LAYER (S1, 2026-07-08) — shared shell primitives (Nav + footer).
+   Only what the global shell needs; landing/report/demo surfaces keep their own
+   blocks. Consumed by components/Nav.tsx and app/layout.tsx. Element selectors
+   `nav` / `footer` are hidden in the report @media print block (unchanged).
+   ========================================================================== */
+
+/* ----- Nav: sticky, hairline-ruled, serif wordmark, sans links (mockup spec) - */
+.site-nav {
+  position: sticky;
+  top: 0;
+  z-index: 40;
+  /* rgba(255,255,255,.88) IS the no-support fallback; blur is progressive */
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);
+  backdrop-filter: saturate(1.4) blur(10px);
+  -webkit-backdrop-filter: saturate(1.4) blur(10px);
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
+}
+.site-nav-in {
+  max-width: var(--maxw);
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 4px;
+  padding: 11px clamp(18px, 4vw, 36px);
+}
+.site-brand {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 9px;
+  margin-right: 18px;
+  font-family: var(--serif);
+  font-weight: 600;
+  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
+  font-size: 16px;
+  color: var(--ink);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+.site-brand-mark {
+  width: 22px;
+  height: 22px;
+  flex: none;
+  color: var(--accent);
+}
+.site-navlink {
+  /* mockup spec: sans 13px (E-3 reviewer fix — the dispatch brief's "mono" was
+     the orchestrator's error; the mockup .navlink inherits the sans body font) */
+  font-family: var(--ff-sans);
+  font-size: 13px;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  text-decoration: none;
+  padding: 6px 11px;
+  border-radius: 7px;
+  white-space: nowrap;
+  transition:
+    background 0.16s var(--ease),
+    color 0.16s ease;
+}
+.site-navlink:hover {
+  background: var(--bg-3);
+  color: var(--ink);
+}
+.site-navlink[aria-current="page"] {
+  background: var(--accent);
+  color: #fff;
+}
+.site-navlink:focus-visible,
+.site-brand:focus-visible {
+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent);
+  outline-offset: 2px;
+}
+.site-status {
+  margin-left: auto;
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 7px;
+  font-family: var(--ff-mono);
+  font-size: 11px;
+  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  background: var(--bg-3);
+  border: 1px solid var(--rule);
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  padding: 5px 11px;
+}
+.site-status-pip {
+  width: 6px;
+  height: 6px;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  background: var(--accent);
+  flex: none;
+}
+
+/* ----- global footer: honesty paragraph on a hairline-ruled panel ----------- */
+.site-footer {
+  margin-top: 20px;
+  border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
+  background: var(--bg-3);
+}
+.site-footer-in {
+  max-width: var(--maxw);
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 40px clamp(18px, 4vw, 36px) 72px;
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.62;
+  color: var(--body);
+}
+
+@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
+  .site-navlink {
+    transition: none;
+  }
+}
+

@import "tailwindcss";

/* ============================================================================
   [-ActivationOps-]{+Curbside Commons+} — [-"Ledger Enterprise"-]{+"Oxblood" site+} design system [-(Stage 1 foundation)-]
[-   Ported from mockups/v3-ledger-enterprise.html. Premium white ground,-]{+(S1 foundation, 2026-07-08)+}
{+   Spec: mockups/ultra-modern-2026-07-08/whole-site-gallery-v2.html (owner-picked).+}

{+   RETHEME-IN-PLACE: every :root token NAME below is preserved (layout.tsx, Nav,+}
{+   and the landing consume them) but the VALUES are remapped to Oxblood — a premium+}
{+   off-white ground (#FBFBFD),+} a [-single-]
[-   vermilion-]{+warm near-black ink ramp (harmonizing with the+}
{+   accent, not cool-gray), wine-tinted hairlines, and ONE burgundy+} accent [-(two-]{+(#8A2233,+}
{+   two+} lightnesses of one [-hue), cool-neutral ink/graphite,-]{+hue). An ADDITIVE "OXBLOOD SITE LAYER (S1)" section holds+}
{+   the site-scoped tokens (wine ramp / severity / serif / ease)+} and [-one signature primitive: the hairline-ruled ledger row (field · value · verdict).-]{+the shared shell+}
{+   primitives (nav + footer).+} Fonts [-are self-hosted-]{+still self-host+} via next/font/google (see
   app/layout.tsx)[-and reach this-]
[-   file-] as [-CSS variables (--font-sans-]{+--font-sans+} / --font-mono / [---font-geist-mono).-]{+--font-geist-mono.+}

{+   INTENTIONALLY UNTOUCHED (byte-for-byte, superseded by later slices):+}
{+   • the entire `.rpt-wrap` report/demo Ledger block (line ~1105 → its print block)+}
{+     — it redefines --paper/--ink/--body/--graphite/--hairline/--um/--sev-* locally,+}
{+     so it is insulated from these :root remaps (S3 re-skins it to Oxblood);+}
{+   • all `.ds-*` / `.cp-*` / `.lp-*` landing rule blocks — they inherit the new token+}
{+     VALUES (new colors, old layout = the expected hybrid until S2 supersedes them).+}
   ========================================================================== */

:root {
  color-scheme: light;

  /* ground —[-true-] premium [-white, no warmth-]{+off-white (NOT pure #fff; pure white+black is an AI-median+}
{+     tell). Warm-neutral steps down.+} */
  --bg: [-#ffffff;-]{+#fbfbfd;+}
  --bg-2: [-#fcfcfd;-]{+#f8f7f8;+}
  --bg-3: [-#f7f7f9;-]{+#f5f3f4;+}

  /* ink + graphite structure [-(cool neutrals, AA+-]{+— a WARM near-black ramp (R>G>B), harmonizing with+}
{+     the wine accent. Contrast recomputed+} on [-white)-]{+the #fbfbfd ground; every step clears+}
{+     the prior cool-gray token's documented ratio.+} */
  --ink: [-#0a0a0c;-]{+#1a1712; /* 17.29:1 — headings, hard marks */+}
  --ink-2: [-#16161a;-]{+#2e2825; /* 14.05:1 — strong text */+}
  --body: [-#34343c;-]{+#423b38;+} /* [-11.6:1-]{+10.61:1+} — body text {+(spec #463f3c was 9.98:1, darkened to clear ≥10:1)+} */
  --graphite: [-#52525c;-]{+#564d48;+} /* [-7.72:1-]{+7.97:1+} — labels, values {+(≥ old 7.72)+} */
  --muted: [-#5d5d68;-]{+#615750;+} /* [-6.50:1-]{+6.80:1+} — secondary mono {+(≥ old 6.50)+} */
  --faint: [-#6c6c78;-]{+#6d635b;+} /* [-5.16:1-]{+5.67:1+} — non-essential ≥13px {+(≥ old 5.16)+} */

  /* hairlines {+— wine-tinted (rgba of the wine-900 hue), darkening steps+} */
  --rule: [-#ececef;-]{+rgba(74, 14, 26, 0.1);+}
  --rule-2: [-#e0e0e4;-]{+rgba(74, 14, 26, 0.17);+}
  --rule-3: [-#d2d2d8;-]{+rgba(74, 14, 26, 0.26);+}

  /* THE single accent — [-vermilion,-]{+burgundy / oxblood,+} two lightnesses of one hue */
  --signal: [-#e2402a;-]{+#8a2233;+} /* fills, dots, rules, marks */
  --signal-text: [-#c0301b;-]{+#8a2233;+} /* [-5.71:1-]{+8.62:1+} on [-white-]{+#fbfbfd+} — small labels / verdicts {+(≥4.5)+} */
  --signal-tint: [-#fbedea;-]{+rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.07);+} /* faint held-row ground */
  --signal-rule: [-#f0d6cf;-]{+rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.24);+} /* hairline at signal hue */

  /* spacing — 4px base */
  --s1: 4px;
@@ -53,6 +68,33 @@
  --ff-sans: var(--font-sans), system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  --ff-mono: var(--font-mono), var(--font-geist-mono), ui-monospace, monospace;

  {+/* ==== OXBLOOD SITE LAYER (S1, 2026-07-08) — additive site-scoped tokens ==== */+}
{+  /* wine ramp — the ONE brand hue, wine-900 (darkest) → wine-500 */+}
{+  --wine-900: #3e0a13;+}
{+  --wine-800: #55101d;+}
{+  --wine-700: #6e1423;+}
{+  --wine-600: #8a2233;+}
{+  --wine-500: #9e3143;+}
{+  /* accent aliases (the site layer reads these; = the wine ramp) */+}
{+  --accent: #8a2233;+}
{+  --accent-hi: #6e1423; /* hover / pressed */+}
{+  --accent-soft: rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.07);+}
{+  --accent-line: rgba(138, 34, 51, 0.24);+}
{+  /* severity — kept perceptually FAR from the wine brand (always paired with a+}
{+     shape + word by consuming surfaces, never colour alone) */+}
{+  --error: #d92d20;+}
{+  --error-soft: rgba(217, 45, 32, 0.08);+}
{+  --warn: #b54708;+}
{+  --warn-soft: rgba(181, 71, 8, 0.11);+}
{+  --ok: #067647;+}
{+  --ok-soft: rgba(6, 118, 71, 0.09);+}
{+  /* serif display stack (brand wordmark + headlines) — no new dependency */+}
{+  --serif: ui-serif, "New York", "Iowan Old Style", "Palatino Linotype", Palatino, Georgia,+}
{+    "Times New Roman", serif;+}
{+  /* shared easing */+}
{+  --ease: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);+}
{+  /* ==== end OXBLOOD SITE LAYER tokens ==== */+}

  font-synthesis: none;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
@@ -78,6 +120,121 @@ body {
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

{+/* ============================================================================+}
{+   OXBLOOD SITE LAYER (S1, 2026-07-08) — shared shell primitives (Nav + footer).+}
{+   Only what the global shell needs; landing/report/demo surfaces keep their own+}
{+   blocks. Consumed by components/Nav.tsx and app/layout.tsx. Element selectors+}
{+   `nav` / `footer` are hidden in the report @media print block (unchanged).+}
{+   ========================================================================== */+}

{+/* ----- Nav: sticky, hairline-ruled, serif wordmark, sans links (mockup spec) - */+}
{+.site-nav {+}
{+  position: sticky;+}
{+  top: 0;+}
{+  z-index: 40;+}
{+  /* rgba(255,255,255,.88) IS the no-support fallback; blur is progressive */+}
{+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);+}
{+  backdrop-filter: saturate(1.4) blur(10px);+}
{+  -webkit-backdrop-filter: saturate(1.4) blur(10px);+}
{+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);+}
{+}+}
{+.site-nav-in {+}
{+  max-width: var(--maxw);+}
{+  margin: 0 auto;+}
{+  display: flex;+}
{+  flex-wrap: wrap;+}
{+  align-items: center;+}
{+  gap: 4px;+}
{+  padding: 11px clamp(18px, 4vw, 36px);+}
{+}+}
{+.site-brand {+}
{+  display: inline-flex;+}
{+  align-items: center;+}
{+  gap: 9px;+}
{+  margin-right: 18px;+}
{+  font-family: var(--serif);+}
{+  font-weight: 600;+}
{+  letter-spacing: -0.01em;+}
{+  font-size: 16px;+}
{+  color: var(--ink);+}
{+  text-decoration: none;+}
{+}+}
{+.site-brand-mark {+}
{+  width: 22px;+}
{+  height: 22px;+}
{+  flex: none;+}
{+  color: var(--accent);+}
{+}+}
{+.site-navlink {+}
{+  /* mockup spec: sans 13px (E-3 reviewer fix — the dispatch brief's "mono" was+}
{+     the orchestrator's error; the mockup .navlink inherits the sans body font) */+}
{+  font-family: var(--ff-sans);+}
{+  font-size: 13px;+}
{+  color: var(--muted);+}
{+  text-decoration: none;+}
{+  padding: 6px 11px;+}
{+  border-radius: 7px;+}
{+  white-space: nowrap;+}
{+  transition:+}
{+    background 0.16s var(--ease),+}
{+    color 0.16s ease;+}
{+}+}
{+.site-navlink:hover {+}
{+  background: var(--bg-3);+}
{+  color: var(--ink);+}
{+}+}
{+.site-navlink[aria-current="page"] {+}
{+  background: var(--accent);+}
{+  color: #fff;+}
{+}+}
{+.site-navlink:focus-visible,+}
{+.site-brand:focus-visible {+}
{+  outline: 2px solid var(--accent);+}
{+  outline-offset: 2px;+}
{+}+}
{+.site-status {+}
{+  margin-left: auto;+}
{+  display: inline-flex;+}
{+  align-items: center;+}
{+  gap: 7px;+}
{+  font-family: var(--ff-mono);+}
{+  font-size: 11px;+}
{+  letter-spacing: 0.04em;+}
{+  color: var(--muted);+}
{+  background: var(--bg-3);+}
{+  border: 1px solid var(--rule);+}
{+  border-radius: 999px;+}
{+  padding: 5px 11px;+}
{+}+}
{+.site-status-pip {+}
{+  width: 6px;+}
{+  height: 6px;+}
{+  border-radius: 50%;+}
{+  background: var(--accent);+}
{+  flex: none;+}
{+}+}

{+/* ----- global footer: honesty paragraph on a hairline-ruled panel ----------- */+}
{+.site-footer {+}
{+  margin-top: 20px;+}
{+  border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);+}
{+  background: var(--bg-3);+}
{+}+}
{+.site-footer-in {+}
{+  max-width: var(--maxw);+}
{+  margin: 0 auto;+}
{+  padding: 40px clamp(18px, 4vw, 36px) 72px;+}
{+  font-size: 13px;+}
{+  line-height: 1.62;+}
{+  color: var(--body);+}
{+}+}

{+@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {+}
{+  .site-navlink {+}
{+    transition: none;+}
{+  }+}
{+}+}

.ds-mono {

  align-items: baseline;
}

@@ -441,13 +598,18 @@ body {

{+  border-radius: 6px;+}

/* ============================================================================
   [-Landing-page section primitives (Layer 1 surfaces)-]{+OXBLOOD LANDING (S2, 2026-07-08)+} —[-ported from-] the [-v3 mockup-]{+editorial scroll-story on the S1 tokens.+}
{+   Spec: the #/ Landing view of whole-site-gallery-v2.html (owner-picked v2). Serif+}
{+   display headlines (scoped to .lp-main), ONE wine accent, hairline-ruled sections,+}
{+   the five-stage flow as a hairline-CONNECTED strip (gate stages emphasised, never+}
{+   numbered 01/02/03). No gradients, no glass, no icon-in-square tiles, radii <= 12px.+}
{+   Replaces the interim lp-* / ds-tech landing block (both were app/page.tsx-only).+}
{+   The CatchPanel keeps its own cp-* block above (SSR-settled + reduced-motion contract).+}
   ========================================================================== */

/* ----- [-DIFFERENTIATION — two ledger columns ----------------------------------]{+panels + grids (restrained cards: hairline, tinted hover, no glow) ----+} */

/* ============================================================================
   THE [-"LEDGER" DESIGN-]{+REPORT / DEMO DOCUMENT+} SYSTEM[-(owner-picked 2026-07-08)-] — [-a Swiss / International--]
[-   Typographic audit certificate on a gallery-white ground.-]{+re-tokened to "Oxblood" in S3 (2026-07-08).+}
   Scoped to the two real verifier surfaces (/report + /demo, both mount .rpt-wrap);
   the landing keeps its own [-system untouched. Reference (adapted, never copied):-]
[-   mockups/design-samples-2026-07-08/sample-1-ledger.html.-]

[-   Ultramarine-]{+system. Spec: mockups/ultra-modern-2026-07-08/+}
{+   whole-site-gallery-v2.html (owner-picked). Lineage: the owner-picked "Ledger"+}
{+   audit-certificate STRUCTURE (Swiss / International-Typographic; flat, no radii /+}
{+   shadows / gradients; the precision of the hairline rules and the spacing IS the+}
{+   design) is RETAINED; every token VALUE+} is {+remapped to the site Oxblood system.+}

{+   S3 re-token: gallery-white ground #FFFFFF → premium off-white #FBFBFD; the cool+}
{+   near-black ink ramp → a warm one;+} the ONE accent {+ultramarine → burgundy #8A2233+}
{+   (the token NAME --um is kept so every consumer follows)+} — SIMULATED tag block ·
   masthead rule · finding index numerals — NEVER on severity. Severity carries its
   own three marks (error / warn / [-info),-]{+info) in warm hues+} kept [-apart-]{+perceptually FAR+} from the
   [-accent. No radii, no shadows, no-]
[-   gradients:-]{+burgundy brand, always paired with a square shape + word. Display headings adopt+}
   the [-precision of-]{+site serif (var(--serif)) per+} the [-hairline rules and-]{+mockup's report register; body stays a+}
{+   system sans, receipts stay mono. The SIMULATED banner keeps its unmissable ink+}
{+   band, re-grounded on+} the [-spacing IS-]{+warm ink, print-color-adjust intact (test-locked).+}
{+   Contrast recomputed on #FBFBFD (ratios in+} the [-design.-]{+token comments below).+}
   Desktop web + printable (see the @media print block below). rpt-* / dmo-*.
   ========================================================================== */
.rpt-wrap {
  /* {+S3 Oxblood re-token (2026-07-08): the+} Ledger [-tokens — pre-decided; #ffffff-]{+STRUCTURE is retained; every token+}
{+     VALUE+} is {+remapped to+} the [-owner gallery-white modification-]
[-     (the sample used #f9f9f6).-]{+site Oxblood system.+} Kept as ONE --paper token so {+every+}
     text-on-ink [-surfaces-]
[-     (the banner-]{+surface (banner+} text, [-the FAIL-]{+verdict+} flag) [-follow to #ffffff-]{+follows+} automatically. {+Contrast+}
{+     recomputed on #fbfbfd — floors: body ≥10:1, graphite ≥7:1, all others ≥4.5:1.+} */
  --paper: [-#ffffff;-]{+#fbfbfd;+} /* {+premium off-white+} ground + every text-on-ink surface (banner text, verdict flag) */
  --ink: [-#101014;-]{+#1a1712;+} /* [-near-black ink:-]{+warm near-black:+} headline, banner ground, verdict stamp, hard marks {+— 17.29:1+} */
  --body: [-#33333b;-]{+#423b38;+} /* long-form body text {+— 10.61:1 (sitewide Oxblood body ramp)+} */
  --graphite: [-#50505a;-]{+#564d48;+} /* rail captions, labels, secondary mono {+— 7.97:1+} */
  --hairline: [-#dcdcd4;-]{+rgba(74, 14, 26, 0.14);+} /* [-the-]{+wine-tinted+} modular-grid rules [-(1px, warm-on-white by intent)-]{+(site --rule family; visual weight of the old #dcdcd4)+} */
  --um: [-#1b3eb8;-]{+#8a2233;+} /*[-ultramarine —-] the ONE accent {+— burgundy/oxblood (token NAME kept from ultramarine) — 8.62:1+} */
  --sev-err: [-#a8231b;-]{+#d92d20; /* 4.67:1 — bright/warm, kept perceptually far from the burgundy brand */+}
  --sev-warn: [-#8a5a06;-]{+#b54708; /* 5.25:1 — amber, far from the brand */+}
  --sev-info: [-#55555e;-]{+#615750; /* warm neutral — 6.80:1 (no info in the fixture; never a brand/alarm hue) */+}
  /* system font stacks [-only — no-]{+match the mockup's report register (system sans + system mono);+}
{+     display headings adopt the site serif (var(--serif)). No+} new dependency.[-Grotesk display + a tabular mono.-] */
  --ledger-sans: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, "Liberation Sans", sans-serif;
  --ledger-mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono",
    monospace;
@@ -1183,11 +1244,12 @@ body {
}
.rpt-title {
  margin: 16px 0 0;
  {+/* S3: masthead adopts the site serif per the mockup's report register. */+}
  font-family: [-var(--ledger-sans);-]{+var(--serif);+}
  font-size: clamp(34px, 4.4vw, 52px);
  font-weight: [-800;-]{+600;+}
  letter-spacing: [--0.03em;-]{+-0.012em;+}
  line-height: [-1.02;-]{+1.05;+}
  color: var(--ink);
  max-width: 24ch;
  text-wrap: balance;
@@ -1640,11 +1702,12 @@ body {
}
.dmo-beat-title {
  margin: 0;
  {+/* S3: beat titles (mockup h3) adopt the site serif per the report register. */+}
  font-family: [-var(--ledger-sans);-]{+var(--serif);+}
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: [-800;-]{+600;+}
  letter-spacing: [--0.02em;-]{+-0.012em;+}
  color: var(--ink);
}

codex
The mechanical check refutes one of the requested claims: the S3 block now consumes `var(--serif)` from `:root` rather than defining every consumed variable locally. It is a scoped-isolation issue, not a runtime break, because `--serif` is defined in the same stylesheet and the current CSS cascade resolves it.

     9	/**
    10	 * The one-page verifier report (W3; plan §5 W3 · S-9 "the report IS a document").
    11	 *
    12	 * Renders a VerifierReport as ONE self-contained page — desktop web + printable
    13	 * (see the `@media print` block in globals.css). The data is the COMMITTED golden
    14	 * fixture reports, imported statically and bundled at build: zero LLM, zero
    15	 * network, $0 — the report-rendering path imports no provider/LLM module (proven
    16	 * by evals/packs/report-view-c1.test.ts). A surface toggle switches between the
    17	 * two serving surfaces the same SOR was checked against (ACP static feed / UCP
    18	 * catalog response); each renders as its own one-page report.
    19	 *
    20	 * Plain: shows the checker's result as a printable one-pager — a plain sentence
    21	 * per catch, then the exact receipts — with the "everything here is made-up test
    22	 * data" label impossible to miss. No AI, no live data.

    90	        {report.ok
    91	          ? "no drift detected"
    92	          : `${report.findingCount} finding${report.findingCount === 1 ? "" : "s"}`}
    93	      </span>
    94	      {!report.ok ? (
    95	        <span className="rpt-verdict-tally">
    96	          {tally.error} error · {tally.warn} warn · {tally.info} info
    97	        </span>
    98	      ) : null}
    99	    </div>
   100	  );

**Verdict: SHIP**

No P1/P2 findings.

**P3 Findings**
- [app/globals.css](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1248): C7 is technically refuted. `.rpt-title` and `.dmo-beat-title` consume `var(--serif)` at [line 1706](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1706), but `--serif` is defined globally at [line 92](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:92), not locally in `.rpt-wrap`. Runtime is fine; this only weakens local encapsulation.
- [app/globals.css](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1196): stale comments remain after S3: `#ffffff` while `--paper` is `#fbfbfd`, plus “ultramarine” at [line 1230](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1230), [line 1266](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1266), and [line 1407](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1407). Comment drift only, no runtime dependency.

**Checks**
- C1 confirmed: `ReportView.tsx`, `DemoView.tsx`, `app/report/page.tsx`, and `app/demo/page.tsx` have empty diffs vs HEAD, so frozen report/demo text was not edited.
- C2 confirmed: print tests still bind `@media print`, both `print-color-adjust` forms globally, and both forms inside `.rpt-sim` at [evals/packs/report-view-c1.test.ts](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/evals/packs/report-view-c1.test.ts:169).
- C3 confirmed: `.rpt-sim` prints on `var(--ink)` with `var(--paper)` text and exact color-adjust at [app/globals.css](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1197); print hides `nav`, `footer`, `.ds-skip`, `.rpt-toolbar` at [line 1636](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1636). No wrong color literal in the print block.
- C4 confirmed by recomputation on `#fbfbfd`: body `10.61`, `--um` `8.62`, error `4.67`, warn `5.25`.
- C5 confirmed enough to ship: severity uses separate vars, visible severity words, and 9px square marks at [app/globals.css](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/app/globals.css:1450); Report TSX keeps severity text at [components/report/ReportView.tsx](/Users/sharan_98/Desktop/AI%20DoorDash%20Merchant%20Engine/components/report/ReportView.tsx:40). Computed CIELAB separation from burgundy is large: error `42.4`, warn `39.4`, info `43.5`.
- E-1 upheld: the `--body` contrast regression is real vs old Ledger, but it clears the pre-decided `>=10:1` floor and matches sitewide Oxblood.
- E-2 upheld as non-blocking: mockup serifs more text than this slice, but limiting serif to `.rpt-title` and `.dmo-beat-title` is a conservative visual-scope choice, not a correctness or honesty regression.

Validation was static review plus `git diff --check`; no npm/browser/print-preview run in this read-only sandbox.
